subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out from Partner Corp — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration.

I'm happy to help coordinate an introductory call. To align on timing, could you share:
1. Your preferred days and time windows for this coming week (please include your timezone)
2. Who from your side would be joining the call (roles/titles)
3. The main topics or objectives you'd like to cover

Once I have this, I can check availability and propose some slots that work for both teams.

Regarding your request for internal contact directory information and direct phone lines — I don't have access to share those details. If a senior-level call becomes appropriate, I can help coordinate that internally after our initial discussion.

Looking forward to hearing back with your availability!

Best regards
